text:
I was put a port of offix to you incoming, as file offix.tar,
 in which situated: Clipboard.tar.gz, Trash.tar.gz Files.tar.gz and so on.

Fix: 

So, or refer to this letter, during unarchiving of offix port,
 or I can reput files to you incoming.
